title: EWL System Upgrade - Tanah Merah to Expo (Changi Depot Disconnection)

title_translations.zh-Hans: 东西线 系统升级 - Tanah Merah 至 Expo（樟宜车厂切断）
title_translations.ms: EWL Naiktaraf Sistem - Tanah Merah ke Expo (Pemutusan Depot Changi)
title_translations.ta: EWL அமைப்பு மேம்பாடு - Tanah Merah முதல் Expo (Changi டீப்போ பிரிப்பு)

updates.text: LTA said the early resumption was made possible by good weather and the effective coordination of ground teams.
Many crowd marshals were on standby at the MRT stations to direct passengers.

05:00-EWL-Planned Train Service Adjustment. There will be no train services between Tanah Merah and Expo stations from 14 to 17 Mar 2026. Train service for other parts of EWL remains normal. Commuters travelling between Tanah Merah to Expo stations can take Shuttle Bus Service S8. Commuters travelling between Changi Airport and City, please use the Downtown Line. For more information, please visit go.gov.sg/lta-ewl-serviceadjustment
Sengkang West LRT to run on single loop for 7 months
The service adjustments will facilitate essential upgrading works, said the Land Transport Authority, SMRT and SBS Transit.
